title: Berkeley culture, University of California highlights, and University extension, 1892-1960 : oral history transcript / and related material, 1962
creator: Richardson, Leon J. (Leon Josiah), 1868-1964. ive
Regional Cultural History Project (University of California, Berkeley)
Fry, Amelia R
description: Comments on long association with the University as professor in the Dept. of Latin and as director of University Extension; interests in Berkeley clubs, public library and musical events; friendship with John Muir, William Keith, Phoebe Apperson Hearst, and others. Photographs inserted and copies of articles appended. To this has been added: clippings, reprints and articles
Dept. of Special Collections, University of California, Los Angeles
subject: Muir, John, 1838-1914
Keith, William, 1838-1911
Hearst, Phoebe Apperson, 1842-1919
University of California, Berkeley. Dept. of Latin
University of California (System). University Extension
Berkeley (Calif.) -- Social life and customs
